prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `e69241bd`.
codex_response:
Implemented `e69241bd` as orthogonal region propagation: each 0-component bordered by exactly one non-`0`/non-`5` seed color is recolored to that seed, while `5` stays as a wall. I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint because it matched the official examples, and I discarded the `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` diagonal-spreading hint; that correction is recorded in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e69241bd/notes.md).

The task package is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e69241bd/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e69241bd/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e69241bd/generator.py). The generator stays on-family by sampling 7x7/9x9 square grids with dense gray `5` barriers, choosing 2-3 base zero-components, planting singleton colored seeds inside them, and deriving outputs by filling those whole latent components. No new shared primitive was needed.

Validation passed end to end: official verifier `4/4`, generated verifier `1000/1000`, build succeeded, and I visually checked [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e69241bd/previews/preview_01.png); it looks on-distribution. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e69241bd/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e69241bd/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e69241bd/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e69241bd/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e69241bd/previews/preview_03.png).
